scripts.build: npm run -w apps/api build && npm run -w apps/worker build && npm run -w apps/web build
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w apps/api typecheck && npm run -w apps/worker typecheck && npm run -w apps/web typecheck && npm run -w packages/db typecheck
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run -w apps/api dev" "npm run -w apps/worker dev"
